summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NASSAQ Drag & Drop Schedule feature and Test Accounts - Iteration 9. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/seed/test-accounts - Seeds principal and teacher accounts successfully
POST /api/auth/login - Principal login (principal@nassaq.com / NassaqPrincipal2026) works
POST /api/auth/login - Teacher login (teacher@nassaq.com / NassaqTeacher2026) works
POST /api/auth/login - Admin login (info@nassaqapp.com) works
PUT /api/schedule-sessions/{id}/move - Move session to empty slot returns success
PUT /api/schedule-sessions/{id}/move - Detects hard conflicts (teacher/class double booking)
PUT /api/schedule-sessions/{id}/move - Returns 404 for invalid session ID
PUT /api/schedule-sessions/{id}/move - Returns 400 for invalid time slot ID
PUT /api/schedule-sessions/{id}/move - Response has all required fields (success, session_id, old_day, old_time_slot_id, new_day, new_time_slot_id, conflicts, status, message, message_en)
Login Page - Test accounts section visible with 3 clickable cards (Admin, Principal, Teacher)
Login Page - Clicking test account card auto-fills email and password fields
Login Page - Principal login redirects to /school dashboard
Login Page - Teacher login works (redirects to home page)
Register Page - Hakim character image removed (only NASSAQ logo present)
Schedule Page - Drag & Drop instruction banner visible
Schedule Page - 8 draggable session elements with data-testid
Schedule Page - 45 droppable cell elements with data-testid
Schedule Page - Schedule grid visible with weekly view
Schedule Page - Conflicts button shows '2 تعارض' (2 conflicts)
Schedule Page - Auto Generate button present
Schedule Page - Publish Schedule button present
Schedule Page - Session click opens detail dialog
Schedule Page - Delete session button in dialog
critical_code_review_comments: Move Session API correctly implements conflict detection for teacher and class double booking
API returns appropriate status codes: success, conflict_warning, hard_conflict
Test accounts are properly seeded with correct roles and tenant associations
Frontend DraggableSession and DroppableCell components use @dnd-kit library correctly
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test accounts seeded via POST /api/seed/test-accounts endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Drag & Drop feature for schedule sessions is fully functional. Move Session API (PUT /api/schedule-sessions/{id}/move) correctly detects conflicts and returns appropriate status. Three test accounts are available: admin, principal, teacher. Login page has clickable test account cards that auto-fill credentials. Register page no longer shows Hakim character image.

move_session: PUT /api/schedule-sessions/{id}/move - Move session with conflict detection
seed_accounts: POST /api/seed/test-accounts - Seed principal and teacher accounts
auth: POST /api/auth/login - Login with all 3 test accounts

move_session_response_statuses.conflict_warning: Session moved but has soft conflicts (needs review)
move_session_response_statuses.hard_conflict: Move rejected due to teacher or class double booking

drag_drop_ui.instruction_banner: ✓ Visible - 'يمكنك سحب وإفلات الحصص لتعديل الجدول'
drag_drop_ui.session_click_dialog: ✓ Opens detail dialog with delete button
